## Funding Proposal

Title:

Summary:

Source URL:

Project DNS URL (normal DNS/ICANN website, usually `https://`; leave blank if none):

Project HNS URL (Handshake-native website, single-label host such as `http://example/`; leave blank if none):

Preferred project URL:

Requested amount:

Currency:

Current pledged amount:

Pledge source URL:

Status:

Proposer name:

Proposer URL:

## Verification

Are you the proposer or maintainer?

Where can maintainers verify this listing?

Should this be marked `self-declared`, `community-submitted`, `unverified`, or another registry label?

Does the project or funding source publish matching metadata such as `/.well-known/hns-funding.json` or `hns-funding.json`?

## Notes

Anything else reviewers should know?

Please include warnings or limitations that consumers should display, especially if the proposal is experimental, inactive, stale, disputed, withdrawn, or potentially unsafe.
